texts.full_text: oor prognosis BCR-ABL+ B-ALL leukemic cells are highly dependent on the expression of endogenous anti- apoptotic MCL-1. Now, we wish to harness our knowledge of MCL-1 biology to improve therapeutic responses while reducing detrimental therapy-associated sequelae. We have identified dihydroarteminisin (DHA), a water- soluble metabolite of the anti-malarial arteminisin, which elicits a down-modulation of MCL-1 expression and sensitizes cells to treatment with BH3-mimetics (ABT-199 and ABT-263). Our central hypothesis is that DHA treatment of BCR-ABL+ B-ALL will trigger the specific downregulation of MCL-1, thereby sensitizing leukemic cells to venetoclax or navitoclax (BH3 mimetics targeting antiapoptotic proteins), ultimately enhancing therapeutic efficacy. To test this hypothesis and validate our approach for potential clinical translation: Specific Aims: 1. Validate the synergistic effect of DHA with BCL-2 inhibitors in vitro. We will use a panel of ALL cell lines, including those resistant to venetoclax or navitoclax treatment alone, and primary patient samples to confirm that combining these agents leads to enhanced apoptosis. - Increased caspase activation and Annexin V/PI staining in treated cells compared with single-agent controls. 2. Investigate the molecular mechanism underlying DHA's proapoptotic effect. We will perform RNA sequencing to identify differentially expressed genes upon treatment, focusing on apoptosis pathways regulated by MCL1 and BCR-ABL signaling. texts.full_text: in Digital Video When industries converge, there is often a collision of terminologies. Different traditions have their own ways of describing the same thing. In the latter half of the 1980s, personal computing converged with the typesetting industry. While the latter talked about points and picas, the former saw everything in terms of pixels. Now computing is converging with entertainment media and, again, we find a heritage of looking at the same thing in different ways. Consider the resolution of digital video. Anyone who has recently purchased a Blu-ray player or a large-screen television is no doubt familiar with the numbers used to characterize high-definition television — 720p, 1080i, and 1080p — even if the exact meaning of these figures may remain elusive. And most people know that, for a given resolution, ‘p’ (progressive scan) is better better than ‘i’ (interlaced). What may be less clear is: 720 or 1080 what? What do these numbers measure? texts.full_text: troops into enemy territory quickly while also providing critical supplies to ground units engaged with a complex network known as the 'Tet Offensive.' The book emphasizes how these innovative tactics allowed U.S military personnel and their allies significant advantages over North Vietnamese fighters who relied more on traditional warfare strategies. The narrative delves deeply not only onto battlefields but into political intricacies, such exploring diplomatic relations between America's administration during that period (1954-1973) with Vietnam. The role of media in shaping public opinion about the war is also highlighted; through television coverage and newspaper articles American citizens were often presented a one-sided picture which fueled both support for continued military involvement as well criticism against it. The book ends by discussing how this conflict has left lasting impacts on all parties involved, particularly with regards to social change within Vietnam itself. The author's neutral tone allows readers an unbiased look at the complexity of America’s role in Southeast Asia during one its most divisive periods and invites reflection upon both historical events as well their relevance today. The American Experience is a comprehensive guide for anyone looking into understanding more about this pivotal era that marked not just Vietnam, but also had significant implications on global politics. The detailed analysis provided by Grace Sevy makes the book an invaluable resource in any academic or personal study of modern history and conflict

texts.full_text: loaded in sinusoidal periodic potentials under the effect of gravity, whose behavior is well described by the original semiclassical prediction [@bloch]. However, quantum mechanics has implications leading beyond the standard semiclassical approximation [@ashcroft; @bloch]. In particular, for cyclic variations of the parameters, as is the case for Bloch oscillations in quasi-momentum space, phase dependent effects can be present, as shown in the seminal work by M. Berry [@berry]. The importance of Berry’s phase in the wave packet dynamics in periodic potentials was recognized by Chang and Niu [@niu], who derived a set of corrections to the semiclassical equations of motions by means of an effective Lagrangian approach [@karplus]. The whole set of corrections are now generally called Berry corrections or Berry terms [@niu1]. As a consequence, anomalous transport may occur in case of parity-breaking potentials, in two and three spatial dimensions. Anomalous effects can be present even in one-dimensional systems, provided that Bloch bands are also subjected to slowly-varying time-dependent perturbations, as discussed in [@niu1] (see also [@yuce; @chong; @artoni; @diener]). In this paper we investigate the effects of Berry corrections on the Bloch oscillations in one-dimensional (1D) time-dependent parity breaking potentials. In particular, we consider the dynamics of a non interacting wave packet in a 1D periodic potential, in the presence of an additional constant force, as can be obtained for instance with ultracold atoms in an optical lattice subjected to gravity [@fermions; @bosons]. Since in 1D Berry terms may appear only when parity is broken and in the presence of time-depending bands [@niu1; @libro], we consider a potential composed by two shifted sinusoidal potentials with commensurate wavelengths, whose amplitudes are modulated in time [@parametric]. We find that parity breaking affects significantly the band structure, already in the static case. Then, in the presence of time-modulations, Bloch oscillations may be dramatically modified owing to the presence of the anomalous velocity

Here are a few steps to help troubleshoot this: 1. Check your theme: Ensure that you've set up your Android styles and themes correctly, especially regarding `android:minSdkVersion` and `android:targetSdkVersion`. Make sure they match the versions used throughout your project. 2. Review XML layout: Double-check if there are any conflicting height or dimension attributes in your navigation_drawer.xml file that might be causing issues with toolbar heights. For example, you could have a hardcoded height for one of your menu items which is not compatible with other views' dimensions. 3. Adjust the Toolbar's max/minHeight: You can adjust these values programmatically to accommodate different content: ```csharp toolbar.SetMaxButtonHeight(YourDesiredValue); toolbar.SetMinButtonHeight(AnotherDesiredValue); ``` 4. Check your Drawables and Images: Ensure that all drawable resources (like icons) are compatible with the sizes required by Android's toolbar. 5. Update MvvmCross version: If you're using an outdated or beta version of MvvmCross, updating to a stable release might solve this issue. 6. Inspect layout in runtime: Use Android Studio's Layout Inspector tool (Tools > Layout Inspector) while your app is running on an emulator/device to visually check if the toolbar height and other views are as expected. If none of these solutions work or you suspect it could be a bug with MvvmCross, consider creating an issue report in their GitHub repository: https://github.com/MvvmCr

texts.full_text: of feeding, it's important to consider how chronic enteropathy affects nutritional status and overall health. Malabsorption, a common feature of chronic enteropathy, can lead to deficiencies in essential nutrients, impacting growth and development in children and contributing to a poorer quality of life for adults. Effective feeding strategies, often involving specialized diets and nutritional supplementation, are crucial in managing these conditions to ensure adequate nutrient intake and support overall health. Recent advancements in understanding the pathophysiology of chronic enteropathy and feeding disorders have led to improved diagnostic tools and more targeted therapeutic interventions. For example, genetic testing has become an important tool in diagnosing conditions like celiac disease, allowing for earlier intervention and better management of the disease. Similarly, advancements in biotherapeutics, such as the development of anti-IL12/IL23 monoclonal antibodies, offer promising new treatment options for patients with chronic enteropathy. In conclusion, the study of chronic enteropathy and feeding is a rapidly evolving field, driven by advances in our understanding of gut immunology, the gut microbiome, and the role of dietary factors in health. texts.full_text: one of the message boards or chatroom on the net about Lasik surgical procedure, you will certainly ask yourself just how any individual might get the guts to schedule a Lasik treatment, and also why on earth they would certainly desire it. The various Lasik centers audio anywhere from impersonal to something just like Dr. Frankenstein's lab, as well as the Lasik procedure itself appears, well, surreal. It feels like the only individuals that would certainly obtain Lasik are those with such negative vision that they could not rise without their glasses on. Well, let me give you my tale of just how I selected Lasik. Of all, my vision is not great, however not dreadful either. I could really go to movies and see well enough to appreciate them without glasses or contacts. However, I needed to wear reading glasses for close work, and my distance vision wasn't perfect, especially in low light conditions. I decided to get Lasik surgery for several reasons: 1. Convenience: I was tired of dealing with glasses and contacts. Glasses would fog up in winter, and contacts would sometimes get dry and uncomfortable. 2. Sports and Outdoor Activities: I enjoy outdoor activities like hiking, cycling, and swimming. Glasses were always a hassle during these activities, and contacts didn't always provide the best vision correction for varying conditions. 3. Confidence: There's a certain freedom and confidence that comes with good vision. I felt that Lasik could improve my quality of life by reducing my dependence on corrective lenses. After doing extensive research and consulting with several Lasik centers, I found a reputable clinic with experienced surgeons. They performed a thorough evaluation to ensure I was a suitable candidate for the procedure. The surgery itself was quick and relatively painless. The recovery period was also shorter than I expected, and within a few days, my vision had significantly improved.

texts.full_text: Increased intramuscular fat induced by reduced dietary protein in finishing pigs: effects on the longissimus lumborum muscle proteome. Due to genetic selection towards reduced subcutaneous fat, the amount of intramuscular fat (IMF) in commercial pigs has been reduced (<2.5%), compromising pork quality. The use of reduced protein diets (RPD) is a good strategy to increase IMF in pigs. We have previously shown that increased IMF promoted by RPD is mediated by lysine restriction. However, the molecular mechanisms involved remain unclear. Here we performed a proteomics study to quantify differentially regulated proteins in the longissimus lumborum muscle of pigs (n = 4) fed a normal protein diet (NPD) (16.0% CP) or a reduced protein diet (RPD) (13.0% CP). Both isobaric tags for relative and absolute quantification (iTRAQ) and label-free methods were used. Glycolysis,...and fatty acid metabolism were the most affected biological processes, with increased abundance of enzymes involved in glycolysis and lipogenesis in the RPD group. Additionally, proteins related to muscle structure and function, such as troponin and tropomyosin, were down-regulated in the RPD group, suggesting a potential impact on meat quality. Our results provide new insights into the molecular mechanisms underlying the effects of RPD on IMF deposition

The supporting cast included Joseph Schildkraut, Sara Haden, Felix Bressart, and William Tracy. PlotThe plot centers on a fictional Hungarian town where two workers at Markowitz & Company—Ferenc Bonffi (played by James Stewart) and Klara Novak (Margaret Sullavan)—barely speak to each other in the shop. Their boss often berates them for their lack of professionalism. Despite animosity, they engage anonymously through a correspondence club run out of Budapest’s General Post Office, unbeknownst both have developed romantic feelings towards "Pistol Pete," an idealistic and passionate young man described as someone neither has yet met in person. Both believe themselves to be corresponding with the same enchanting correspondent. As their letters become more intimate over time—expressing emotions they can't communicate face-to-face—they gradually fall for one another through these missives, each unaware that it is actually meant for "Pistol Pete." When Ferenc discovers Klara’s real identity as his pen pal—a moment both painful and enlightening—the film navigates the ensuing complexity of reconciling their office antagonism with genuine personal affection. This object is used for both: - function names, to allow us the check that there are no conflicting overloads (e.g. f(int) and void). AND also as an identifier. The second usage allows more flexibility than just using strings: 1- We can avoid name clashes between functions with different signatures. pythran is able, for instance to declare two externals: - int foo(double); from the C function double f(int); void bar(float,int); which correspond also (in fact) a call on this same c-function: #include <iostream> float g(); using namespace std; // This is really not what you expect: int main() { cout << "g(): "<< 2.0*g()<<"\n"; return (int) ((double)(1)); } - In that case, we will declare a function foo(double), and another bar(float,int). The only difference is in the parameter names. This allows us to avoid naming conflicts. """ def __init__(self): self._mangled = '' # When dealing with externals, #@param base_name: should be always provided, but not necessarily a string: If this name matches any existing function (name and signature), then the mangle will match - either an overloaded version of that external. The records of 4 patients treated for a spermatocytic seminoma between 1974 and 1993 were reviThe medical history and treatment outcomes of these four individuals provide valuable insights into the management and prognosis of this rare testicular tumor. Spermatocytic seminomas are known for their distinct histological features, including a lack of lymphovascular invasion or aggressive behavior compared to classical seminoma types (Moul et al., 1983). The first patient presented in 1974 with an incidental finding during routine examination. He underwent radical inguinal orchiectomy, and the pathology report coNfirmed a spermatocytic seminoma without any signs of metastasis. The second case was diagnosed via ultrasound-guided biopsy in 1982 after experiencing mild testicular discomfort for several months prior to seeking medical attention; he also underwent orchiectomy with no evidence of spread upon follow-up examinations over a decade later (Klein et al., 1975). The third and fourth cases, diagnosed in the late '80s and early '90s respectively, had similar presentations: slow-growing testicular masses detected through self or physician examination. texts.full_text: om Wikipedia, the encyclopedia (Redirected from ) Stage lighting accessories are components manufactured for (non-automated) stage lighting instruments. Most conventional fixtures are designed to accept a number of different accessories designed to assist in the modification of the output. These accessories are intended to either provide relatively common functionality not originally provided in a fixture (such as beam shaping through ), or to extend the versatility of a lighting instrument by introducing features. accessories have been designed to overcome limitations or difficulties some fixtures present in specific applications. All stage lighting accessories fall into one of three distinct categories: components installed inside the fixture, components affixed to the front of the fixture (in front of the lens), or components mounted elsewhere on the exterior of a fixture (to the side, top or bottom). texts.full_text: However, the underlying neurological dysfunctions remain poorly understood. The main goal of this study was to identify brain structures activated both by increases in cognitive activity and during timing tasks in patients with SZ and BD relative to controls. We conducted two signed differential mapping (SDM) meta-analyses of functional magnetic resonance imaging studies assessing the brain response to increasing levels of cognitive difficulty: one concerned SZ, and the other BD patients. We conducted a similar SDM meta-analysis on neuroimaging of timing in SZ (no studies in BD could be included). Finally, we carried outa conjunction analysis to identify brain regions that were commonly affected in timing and cognitive control in SZ and BD. The meta-analysis of cognitive control in SZ and BD included studies that manipulated cognitive load, and timing studies were included that manipulated timing precision. The analysis of cognitive control in SZ and BD revealed that, in SZ, cognitive load was associated with reduced activation in the dorsolateral prefrontal cortex (DLPFC), the anterior cingulate cortex (ACC), and the insula, with BD showing reduced activation in the DLPFC and insula, and increased activation in the ACC and the orbitofrontal cortex (OFC). For the timing in sZ, the meta-analysis indicated reduced activation in the DLPFC, the insula, and the cerebellum, with the cerebellum showing the most consistent and significant reduction in activation in SZ patients compared to healthy controls. texts.full_text: where there is a file named version and in the .minecraft folder I have a folder named resources and a text file named options. Can someone tell me how I can get all files to play Minecraft? It says: Failed to launch Fatal error occurred (4): connection reset That is the text displayed when I go to minecraft.net in a browser but when I open downloaded Minecraft I cant log in and I cannot play offline because it says: Not downloaded. Additionally, the Minecraft launcher does not load the HTML version history page. Instead, it just displays a blank grey background with black raw HTML. A: Sounds to me that you have somehow gotten a partial download of Minecraft. The simplest way to fix this is to launch the client and choose Options -> Force Update. When you log in, Minecraft should automatically redownload the game files. If that doesn't work, you may need to try a more brute fforce approach: delete everything except for your resource packs (if any) from %APPDATA%/.minecraft then restart it and see if this allows fresh downloads of all needed assets/libraries etc... Also make sure there isn’t anything blocking internet access such as firewalls which

texts.full_text: Bolsøya is an island in Molde Municipality in Møre og Romsdal county, Norway. The island lies in the Romsdalsfjorden at the entrance to the Fannefjorden. The island is connected to the mainland by the Bolsøy Bridge and to the town of molde by the Fannefjord Tunnel, both on County Road 64. The iland's highest point reaches an elevation of about 35 meters above sea level (1). It is known for its beautiful landscapes and scenic views. Bolsøya has a long history with evidence dating back to the Stone Age period, showcasing human settlement since ancient times(2) . Today it's mainly residential but also attract tourists due to nearby attractions like The Romsdal Museum located on mainland close by
